vibe: Gritty, militaristic, brotherhood, law enforcement, rugged, spartan, distressed metallic.

patterns.hero: Min-height 80vh. Full-bleed background image with heavy black gradient overlay (bg-black/60 to bg-black/90 at bottom). Content aligned bottom-left or center.
patterns.product_grid: Grid layout: 1 column mobile, 2 tablet, 3 or 4 desktop. Strict alignment. Products in cards with exposed borders.
patterns.bento_showcase: Asymmetric bento grid for the two main sticker designs. Dumpster Fire spans 2 columns, Mental Health spans 1 column.
patterns.borders: Technical look. Use 1px borders (border-[#222631]) around sections and grid items. Zero border-radius (rounded-none) for a harsh, tactical feel.

surfaces_and_components.card: bg-[#12151C] border border-[#222631] rounded-none hover:border-[#FF4500]/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden
surfaces_and_components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0C10]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#222631]
surfaces_and_components.button_primary: bg-[#FF4500] text-white hover:bg-[#E63E00] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm inline-flex items-center justify-center transition-all
surfaces_and_components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8C92A0] text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm transition-all
surfaces_and_components.badge: bg-[#1A1D24] border border-[#3A4150] text-[#FFFFFF] text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-widest
surfaces_and_components.forms: Inputs should have bg-[#0A0C10], border border-[#222631], text-white, focus:border-[#FF4500] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF4500]. Sharp corners.
surfaces_and_components.textures: Apply a subtle noise/grain texture overlay (using a repeating radial gradient or SVG noise) across the app to give a gritty, distressed feel.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark watchtower behind barbed wire in fog. Perfect for Hero section background.
Dark metallic texture. Good for secondary section backgrounds.

client_stickers.description: Dumpster Fire Response Team sticker (A Yard custody). Orange/Fire accents.
Mule Creek Mental Health Team sticker. Purple accents.

placeholders.description: Tactical apparel model. Use as placeholder for T-shirts/Hoodies.
Dark spartan helmet on reflective surface. Use for About page or category headers.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should not have soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders that light up on hover. Images in cards scale slightly (scale-105) on hover.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring focus: ring-2 ring-[#FF4500] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#0A0C10].
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Minimalist fade. No bouncy animations. The vibe is serious and structured.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 ratio. Dark grey text (#9BA1B0) on #0A0C10 passes, but use #FFFFFF for primary info.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, cart toggles) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', data-testid='checkout-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React (.js files) and Tailwind CSS.
Incorporate Shadcn UI for complex interactive components (Select, Drawer/Sheet for cart, Forms), but customize them to remove rounded corners (use rounded-none) and apply the dark tactical palette.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the Hero and Bento grids to allow creative asymmetry. Do not force them into generic cards.

The client's sticker URLs are in .HEIC format. Render them using standard tags. If browsers fail to load them, provide a fallback or use CSS background patterns with the tactical placeholder images, but attempt to display the stickers first.
Implement a robust 'Cart Drawer' (Shadcn Sheet) that allows users to view selected apparel/items before navigating to Stripe checkout.
Product catalog needs filtering by 'Category' (T-shirts, Hoodies, etc.) and 'Yard' (A-E Yard, ISU, etc.).
Integrate Lucide React icons for UI elements (ShoppingCart, Menu, X, Shield, Crosshair).
Add the tag 'Five Buildings • One Mission' prominently in the footer or About section.
Ensure the design does not look like a generic SaaS template. It must feel like a premium military/law enforcement gear site.
